title: Caldera - Remote Data Staging via SMB Share Write
description: Detects staging of collected data on remote SMB shares before exfiltration. Caldera T1074.002 emulation copies files to a UNC share path accessible from the attacker system, consolidating data from multiple compromised hosts. Patterns include net use with copy/xcopy writing to remote UNC destinations.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( (('Command Line' like '*copy * \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*copy /Y \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*xcopy /s \\\\*')) or ('Process Name' like '*\\robocopy.exe' and 'Command Line' like '* \\\\*') or (('Command Line' like '*Copy-Item -Destination \\\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*Move-Item -Destination \\\\*')) ) and (('Command Line' like '*C:\\Temp*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\Users\\Public*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\ProgramData*' or 'Command Line' like '*%TEMP%*')))
falsepositives: Backup software staging files to a central share
IT teams consolidating data for migration
